title: Health Extension Workers (10 Positions)
description: The Health Office is seeking 10 qualified Health Extension Workers to provide primary healthcare services across the woreda's health posts.
requirements: Diploma in Health Extension, minimum 2 years experience, registered with regional health bureau

title: Primary School Teachers (15 Positions)
description: The Education Office is recruiting 15 Primary School Teachers for various schools across the woreda.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Education, teaching certificate, proficiency in Amharic and English

title: Agricultural Extension Experts (5 Positions)
description: The Agriculture Office needs 5 Agricultural Extension Experts to support farming communities with modern agricultural practices.
requirements: BSc in Agriculture or related field, 3 years experience in extension services

title: Accountant (2 Positions)
description: The Finance Office is hiring 2 Accountants to manage woreda financial records and budget tracking.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, CPA certification preferred, 2+ years experience

title: ICT Support Officer (1 Position)
description: The Administration is seeking an ICT Support Officer to manage the woreda's computer systems and network infrastructure.
requirements: Diploma or Degree in ICT, CompTIA A+ or equivalent, experience with LAN/WAN networks

title: Road Construction Engineers (3 Positions)
description: The Road Office is hiring 3 Road Construction Engineers on contract basis for the upcoming road construction project.
requirements: BSc in Civil Engineering, 5+ years road construction experience, registered with ERA
